creator: florian.millet@laposte.net
text:
It was a little more complicated than anticipated but I tested these 3 images :
- FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-amd64-20230223-fe5c211ba873-261074-bootonly.iso
- FreeBSD-13.2-STABLE-amd64-20230223-bc68c55166ad-254667-bootonly.iso
- FreeBSD-12.4-STABLE-amd64-20230223-r372946-bootonly.iso

and in all 3 images the same command failed, I will attach screenshots of the session this I did that via KVM/IPMI.
